name: Unstructured
tagline: Unstructured provides a platform and tools to ingest and process unstructured documents for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) and model fine-tuning.
description:
Unstructured provides a platform and tools to ingest and process unstructured documents for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) and model fine-tuning.

Docs: https://github.com/Unstructured-IO/unstructured-api?tab=readme-ov-file#--general-pre-processing-pipeline-for-documents?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  unstructured:
    image: downloads.unstructured.io/unstructured-io/unstructured-api:latest
    environment:
      - UNSTRUCTURED_API_KEY=95e16c92ba80699f813120114c66bf7a
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -qO-
        - http://0.0.0.0:8000/healthcheck
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42130:8000
